summary: DHH notes that a Danish journalist named Jeppe has published an article about bloggers in the major Danish newspaper Jyllands-Posten. The article covers how the Reboot '01 conference sparked a surge in Danish blogging, featuring quotes from several bloggers including DHH. He praises the article as a well-written introduction to blogging but calls for deeper coverage of the phenomenon. The post also reflects his guilt about not updating his own blog frequently enough despite growing readership.
key_points: A major Danish newspaper published an article covering the emerging blogging phenomenon
The Reboot '01 conference was a catalyst for Danish blogging activity
DHH sees mainstream media coverage of blogging as validation but wants more in-depth treatment
Even early bloggers felt pressure to post consistently for their audiences
money_quotes: All these people coming to my digital domicile and I haven't even been a well-behaved blogger and shared much for the past couple weeks.
That was the introduction. Now bring on us the full story.
key_insight: Early blogging culture carried both excitement about mainstream recognition and an appetite for deeper coverage beyond introductory pieces.
